ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Application_Status__c))), OR( ISBLANK(FirstName), ISBLANK(LastName), ISBLANK(Phone), ISBLANK(MailingPostalCode), ISBLANK(Monthly_Income__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(Support_Option__c)) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Complete all required grant application fields before saving.
